# .NET 10.0 Package Update Progress

## Overview

Updating all NuGet packages to latest stable net10.0-compatible versions across 21 projects. AutoMapper and FluentAssertions kept at current versions (commercial license change). IdentityServer4 kept as-is.

**Progress**: 3/3 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-update-packages: Update all NuGet packages across the solution
- ✅ 02-fix-build-issues: Fix any compilation errors from package updates
- ✅ 03-docker-build-verification: Verify build via docker-compose
